failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: Vwm8ZZ
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"relation \"scraping_jobs\" does not exist\nLINE 2: INSERT INTO scraping_jobs (\n ^","timestamp":"2026-04-20T19:09:17.275272+00:00","correlation_id":"841fbcd0-4c44-4ee9-994c-8e8860a4e339"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"chunking_config": {}, "crawl_config": {}, "metadata": {"source": "openapi-example"}, "url": "https://www.city.gov/housing/guide", "user_id": "schemathesis"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper

- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Unable to connect to agent service: Server disconnected without sending a response.","timestamp":"2026-04-20T19:15:55.038136+00:00","correlation_id":"1335acd7-f802-473a-aa89-6062c92acc9f"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/ask?question=0&thread_id=null&thread_id=null'
